query_normalized: predicting the impact of cold work on recrystallization kinetics in aluminum alloys materials science
rationale: The paper focuses on corrosion-fatigue failure mechanisms (pitting, intergranular corrosion) rather than the recrystallization kinetics or the specific influence of cold work on microstructural evolution during annealing. While both involve aluminum alloys and plastic deformation, the paper addresses a distinct physical construct (fatigue life vs. phase transformation kinetics) and does not satisfy the criteria for same-mechanism evidence, variable overlap, or foundational methodology for the us
